reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio está buena y es necesaria di uno viene haciendo un viaje largo.
Lastima que no está muy limpia, porque la gente es descuidada o por falta de personal de limpieza.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is good and a must-visit if you're coming on a long trip.
It's a shame it's not very clean, either because people are careless or because there's a lack of cleaning staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobVl1M1V3EAE

reviews.comment:
Un desastre los baños y carisimo el café...nunca me había pasado en una YPF

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were a disaster and the coffee was ridiculously expensive... I've never experienced anything like this at a YPF station before.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNmRIVHFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención precios bastantes caros para comprar algo ahí

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but prices are quite high for buying anything there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocWJIRGVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente restaurante,  impecable en higiene. Servicio muy bueno! La parrila muy abundante. Precio totalmente a ocorde.
Recomendado 100 %. Felicitaciones!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent restaurant, impeccably clean. Very good service! The grill is very generous. The price is perfectly reasonable.
100% recommended. Congratulations!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoaVpuMkd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los playeros atienden muy bien, adentro se tarda en cobrar, pero lo además bien !

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are very helpful; it takes a while to get paid inside, but it's all good!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoc1llczhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención en auto servicio bastante desagradable...diferente a los playeros...

(Translated by Google)
The drive-thru service was quite unpleasant...unlike the service at the gas stations...

reviews.comment:
Las personas eran atentas,pero en el mini market y cafetería super lentos, por que solo había una persona para cobrar y preparar el pedido

(Translated by Google)
The people were attentive, but in the mini market and cafeteria they were super slow, because there was only one person to collect and prepare the order.
